creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: LGPL21, not LGPL2. Basically, I believe the existing license list is correct. Please submit a new patch with this fix as well as Tobias's. If you have some spare cycles, I see that upstream has released v3.2.7 so you could update to that instead. If you don't have spare cycles, we can land 3.2.6 anyway.
